fields.label: Rule Name
fields.description: Descriptive name for this validation rule

fields.label: Rule Type
fields.options:
Required Field
Field Length
Format Validation
Value Range
Allowed Values
Regex Pattern
Unique Value
Conditional Required
Image Dimension
File Size
Custom Script
fields.description: Type of validation to perform

fields.label: Target Field
fields.description: Field name to validate (e.g., product_name, short_description)

fields.label: Severity
fields.description: Severity level when rule fails

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this rule

fields.label: Minimum Length
fields.description: Minimum character length for the field

fields.label: Maximum Length
fields.description: Maximum character length for the field

fields.label: Minimum Value
fields.description: Minimum numeric value for the field

fields.label: Maximum Value
fields.description: Maximum numeric value for the field

fields.label: Format Type
fields.options:
Email
URL
Phone
GTIN
SKU
Date
Currency
Postal Code
fields.description: Predefined format to validate against

fields.label: Regex Pattern
fields.description: Regular expression pattern for validation

fields.label: Allowed Values
fields.description: Comma-separated list of allowed values

fields.label: Condition Field
fields.description: Field to check for condition

fields.label: Condition Operator
fields.options:
Equals
Not Equals
In
Not In
Is Set
Is Not Set
fields.description: Operator for the condition

fields.label: Condition Value
fields.description: Value to compare against (comma-separated for In/Not In)

fields.label: Minimum Width (px)
fields.description: Minimum image width in pixels

fields.label: Minimum Height (px)
fields.description: Minimum image height in pixels

fields.label: Maximum Width (px)
fields.description: Maximum image width in pixels

fields.label: Maximum Height (px)
fields.description: Maximum image height in pixels

fields.label: Max File Size (MB)
fields.description: Maximum file size in megabytes

fields.label: Allowed Extensions
fields.description: Comma-separated list of allowed file extensions (e.g., jpg,png,webp)

fields.label: Custom Validation Script
fields.description: Python code that returns True/False. Available variables: doc, field_value

fields.label: Custom Error Message
fields.description: Custom error message to display when validation fails

fields.label: Remediation Hint
fields.description: Guidance for fixing the validation error

fields.label: Weight
fields.description: Weight of this rule in quality score calculation (1.0 = normal)

fields.label: Affects Completeness Score
fields.description: Whether this rule affects the product completeness score
